hero.imageAlt: Poas Cottage bedroom at Mango Valley
hero.title: Poas Cottage

description: Two rooms and a terrace overlooking hummingbird-filled greenery. Queen bed with orthopedic mattress, dining table, en-suite shower, and rocking chairs with sweeping Poás views.

booking.title: Reserve Poas Cottage
booking.description: Reconnect with the rhythm of nature. Our team is ready to help you plan your stay.
